settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Data migration from Excel and database backup management.

migration.title: Data Migration from Excel
migration.description: Import publishers, history, and weekly schemas from the scheduling Excel file.

step1.title: Step 1: Upload Excel File
step1.description: Select the Excel file (.xlsx) with the scheduling data.
step1.sheetCounts: Sheets found: {inscritos} publishers, {historico} history records, {variables} weekly schemas

step2.title: Step 2: Match Publishers
step2.description: Match Excel names with publishers already loaded in the system.

step3.title: Step 3: Import Publisher Flags
step3.description: Update enablement flags for matched publishers.

step4.title: Step 4: Import History
step4.description: Import assignment history from Excel (~10,000 records).

step5.title: Step 5: Import Weekly Schemas
step5.description: Import weekly meeting structure and parts from Excel.

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.description: Download or restore the system SQLite database.

download.title: Download Backup
download.description: Download a copy of the current database file.

upload.title: Restore Backup
upload.description: Upload a database file (.db) to replace the current data. THIS ACTION REPLACES ALL DATA.
upload.confirm: Are you sure? This will replace ALL current data.
upload.success: Database restored successfully. Please reload the page.
